Title: Canvas Sling Bag
Body (HTML): Single-strap canvas sling bag with zip main compartment and front utility pocket. Adjustable webbing strap, fits a tablet, phone, wallet and essentials.

Title: Aviator Sunglasses
Body (HTML): Classic aviator-frame sunglasses with UV400-protected lenses. Lightweight metal frame, silicone nose pads, semi-mirrored finish.

Title: Cotton Baseball Cap
Body (HTML): Six-panel cotton baseball cap with curved brim and adjustable rear strap. Embroidered logo at front, sweat-wicking inner band.

Title: Leather Wallet — Bifold
Body (HTML): Bifold wallet in full-grain leather with six card slots, two cash compartments and a transparent ID window. Hand-stitched edges, RFID-blocking lining.

Title: Printed Silk Scarf
Body (HTML): Lightweight printed silk scarf with hand-rolled hems. Versatile drape — knot at the neck, tie to a bag handle, or wear in the hair.

Title: Webbing Crossbody Bag
Body (HTML): Compact crossbody bag with quick-release webbing strap and contrast buckle. Zip top, internal mesh pocket, water-resistant nylon shell.

Title: Canvas Slip-Ons
Body (HTML): Easy on-and-off canvas slip-ons with vulcanised rubber outsole. Padded insole, elasticated side gores, clean minimalist upper.

Title: Chunky Sandals
Body (HTML): Cushioned footbed sandals with chunky moulded sole and adjustable hook-and-loop straps. All-day comfort with a modern silhouette.

Title: Running Sports Shoes
Body (HTML): Cushioned running shoes with EVA midsole and breathable knit upper. Reflective heel detail, lace-up closure, multi-surface rubber outsole.

Title: Flat Loafers
Body (HTML): Slip-on flat loafers in soft synthetic leather. Padded footbed, low-profile sole, classic moccasin stitching at the toe.
